title: Creamy Coconut Peruvian Chicken Shoyu Ramen Aji-De-Gallina
description: Light, cozy Peruvian dish featuring tender chicken, oranges, and a rich creamy sauce, served in a banana leaf. Vegan-friendly alternative available.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, coconut cream, orange juice, and orange zest. Set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Pour in the soy sauce mixture and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and cook until sauce has thickened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in namul blanch seasoning and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Meanwhile, blanch banana leaves in boiling water for 30 seconds to make them pliable. Drain and set aside.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of the chicken and sauce onto a banana leaf, followed by a sprinkle of green onions and toasted peanuts.
Fold the banana leaf to form a packet and serve immediately.
